title: Hierarchy of Java Literals
description: A visual classification of the different types of literals available in Java, showing their categories and specific examples.
relationships: Numeric Literals are subdivided into Integer (e.g., 10, 20L) and Floating-Point (e.g., 3.14f, 2.71828)
Character and String literals use single and double quotes respectively
All literals are direct source code representations of fixed values
